lemma_statement.name: restricted_continuation_boundary_trace_existence_discharge_lemma
lemma_statement.claim: On the restricted-continuation boundary portion partial Sigma_R, the boundary trace of the restricted-continuation state exists as a certified trace object whenever the explicitly listed trace-domain, regularity, and boundary-geometry hypotheses are supplied.

required_inputs.name: restricted_continuation_region_lipschitz_boundary
required_inputs.role: provides a trace-admissible boundary chart structure for partial Sigma_R

required_inputs.name: state_spatial_regularitiy_on_restricted_region
required_inputs.role: places the restricted-continuation state in the trace domain required by the boundary trace operator

required_inputs.name: trace_operator_available_on_restricted_region
required_inputs.role: supplies the bounded trace map from the interior regularity space to the boundary trace space

required_inputs.name: restriction_compatible_with_boundary_chart
required_inputs.role: ensures the restricted-continuation cutoff/restriction does not destroy trace admissibility

discharged_obligations: Separates boundary trace existence from normal trace existence.
Certifies the exact assumptions under which the restricted-continuation boundary trace exists.
Promotes boundary trace existence from an undischarged target obligation to a conditional discharge lemma.
non_claims: Does not prove normal trace existence.
Does not prove boundary flux pairing.
Does not prove integration by parts.
Does not prove full RR closure.
